applied_this_run.description: Created bot/data/llm/graduated_rules.json with 3 critical runtime rules: hype_long_veto_v1 (HYPE BUY veto, 35 trades 23% WR), sol_long_veto_v1 (SOL BUY veto, 34 trades 24% WR), illiquid_regime_penalize_v1 (illiquid -15 conf, 57 trades 28% WR). Gate 1g in signal_pipeline.py now enforces these at runtime — previously data/llm/graduated_rules.json was MISSING so GraduatedRulesEngine loaded 0 rules silently.
applied_this_run.verification: Engine.evaluate_signal() tested: HYPE BUY → VETO, SOL BUY → VETO, ETH SELL illiquid 72% → 57%, ETH SELL trending 78% → untouched

HYPE_RULE_NOT_WIRED.finding: data/llm/graduated_rules.json was missing. GraduatedRulesEngine loaded 0 rules. Gate 1g was a silent no-op.
HYPE_RULE_NOT_WIRED.action_taken: Created graduated_rules.json with 3 critical rules. Verified via evaluate_signal() test.

next_run_priority: Bot restart required. On restart: verify HYPE BUY/SOL BUY veto fires in rejection_tracker.json within first 10 signals.
